message:
feat(providers/anthropic): base URL normalization, OAuth bearer lane, and Windows home dir

Three distinct improvements to the Anthropic provider path:

1. Base URL normalization (mod.rs): The legacy models catalog provides
   baseUrl as "https://api.anthropic.com" without the API path suffix.
   create_provider() passed this directly to AnthropicProvider::with_base_url(),
   replacing the default "https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages" and causing
   HTTP 404 errors on every request. Added normalize_anthropic_base() that
   appends "/v1/messages" when missing, matching the pattern already used by
   normalize_openai_base() for OpenAI providers.

2. OAuth bearer token lane preservation (anthropic.rs): When Anthropic OAuth
   credentials flow through the provider-agnostic api_key plumbing, the
   provider loses the information needed to choose Bearer auth headers vs
   X-API-Key headers. The auth system now marks Anthropic OAuth tokens with
   a "__pi_anthropic_oauth_bearer__:" prefix (see auth.rs companion commit);
   the Anthropic provider's stream() method strips the marker via
   unmark_anthropic_oauth_bearer_token() and forces Bearer auth mode with
   the required beta flags (claude-code-20250219, oauth-2025-04-20) and
   anthropic-dangerous-direct-browser-access header.

3. Windows home directory resolution (anthropic.rs): home_dir_with_env_lookup
   now falls back to USERPROFILE, then HOMEDRIVE+HOMEPATH when HOME is unset.
   This mirrors the same change in auth.rs (separate commit) and enables
   Kimi credential file discovery on Windows.

Tests added:
- home_dir_lookup_falls_back_to_userprofile
- home_dir_lookup_falls_back_to_homedrive_homepath
- test_stream_uses_bearer_headers_for_marked_anthropic_oauth_token

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
